name: P2 Solar, Inc.
summary: . General P2 Solar, Inc., a Delaware corporation (hereinafter referred to as we, us, the Company, P2 Solar or the Registrant) has been in existence as a Company (including its predecessor British Columbia Corporation) since 1990. As discussed more fully below, the Companys current business operations are focused on the construction of residential and commercial rooftop and ground mount solar power plants in Canada.
